options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Lets the user choose the completion goal
Defeat Demon - Beat the boss at the end
Hidden Rooms - Find all of Dan Hand's secret rooms
All - Get all hidden rooms, chalices AND defeat the demon
Chalices - Collect all chalices (Collect all chalices doesn't work right now)

options.name: progression_option
options.description:
Lets users choose how they wish to progress
Vanilla - Plays the game like normal
Open - All areas are accessible from the start

options.name: include_chalices_in_checks
options.description: Include Chalices in Checks

options.name: life_bottles
options.description: Set how many life bottles you want in the pool

options.name: keyitemsanity
options.description: Sets whether to mix key items into the pool

options.name: antidote_in_pool
options.description:
Sets how to deal with the Kensington Antidote Drops
Note: This will not turn on unless keysanity is TRUE

False: Removes the antidote from the pool and just works like the vanilla game.
True: Adds the antidote to the pool. It will always be there in Kew Gardens at 100%

options.name: movesanity
options.description: Puts dans traversal moves into the pool (NOT IMPLIMENTED)

options.name: shopsanity
options.description: Puts AP items in the spiv (NOT IMPLIMENTED)

options.name: traps
options.description: Allow traps in the pool (not all traps are working yet)

options.name: ammo
options.display_name: Ammo and Charge in Item Pool
options.description: Allow Ammo and Charge in the pool

options.name: deathlink
options.description: Sets if you want deathlink or not (not working yet)

options.name: break_ammo_limit
options.description: Allow weapon ammo to be higher than the default

options.name: break_percentage_limit
options.description: Allow weapon percentages to be higher than the default

options.name: cheat_menu
options.description:
Sets the cheat menu to be available in the pause menu. This allows level skip, chalice completion and
invulnerability. Please note, though. That the chalices are counted via checks as getting the actual number isn't
viable at the moment. Sorry!

options.name: guaranteed_items
options.description: Guarantees that the specified items will be in the item pool

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
